name: mibbers
description: Mibbers — validacao de cupom: backend NestJS (:3001) + frontend Next.js (:3000)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,magenta "npm run start:dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w web
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w web
